ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, option, future, forex) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the market instrument (e.g., stock ticker, option code) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the market instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the market instrument */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the market instrument */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the market instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the market instrument */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the market instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the market instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the market instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "bull" INTEGER /* Number of bull indicators */,
  "big_bull" INTEGER /* Number of big bull indicators */,
  "cancel_sell" INTEGER /* Number of cancel sell indicators */,
  "bear" INTEGER /* Number of bear indicators */,
  "big_bear" INTEGER /* Number of big bear indicators */,
  "cancel_buy" INTEGER /* Number of cancel buy indicators */,
  "indicators" TEXT /* List of indicators used to determine the trend */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment data */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., 0.5 for neutral, 1.0 for positive) */,
  "news_headlines" TEXT /* News headlines related to the market */,
  "social_media_posts" TEXT /* Social media posts related to the market */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Entities mentioned in the news headlines and social media posts */,
  "topics" TEXT /* Topics discussed in the news headlines and social media posts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user input */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the input */,
  "market_symbol" TEXT /* Market symbol (e.g., stock ticker, option code) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the input range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the input range */,
  "indicator" TEXT /* Indicator used for analysis (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for analysis (e.g., 1d, 1w, 1m) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_inputs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "input_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user input that generated the result */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the analytics model */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation made by the analytics model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model used for analysis (e.g., LSTM, Random Forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_input_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_id") REFERENCES user_inputs ("input_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration item */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration item (e.g., API key, database URL) */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Quandl, Alpha Vantage) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials for the data source (e.g., API key, username/password) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., 'Initial release', 'Updated with new data') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the system change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., 'UPDATE', 'INSERT', 'DELETE') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system status entry */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status entry */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the system in seconds */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the system as a percentage */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the system as a percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the system as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the social media post */,
  "user" TEXT /* User who made the social media post */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the social media post was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)
